urdu transliteration text:
Jashn is tarha se zahra, ka manaya jaaye
Asmaanon ko zaminon, pe bichaya jaaye
english translation text:
Let us celebrate the birth of Zahra in such a way...
That the festivities are spread from the skies to the earth…

urdu transliteration text:
Rok kar hazrate jibril ko, boli fizzaa
Ghar hai Zahra ka, yaha puch ke ayaa jaaye
english translation text:
After stopping him, Fizza said to Gabriel the angel...
This is the house of Zahra,
and here, permission is sought before entry...

urdu transliteration text:
Jo puchiye ke kya hai fatema…
kya hai fatema
Karam ki inteha hai fatema…
english translation text:
Whosoever asks, "Who is Fatima?"
She is the peak of generosity and kindness

urdu transliteration text:
Hijab e kibriyai hai
Kisi ki kab rasai hai
Ke parda e khuda hai fatema
english translation text:
She is one of the greatest signs (of God)
It’s hard to comprehend the extent of her status
She is the veil (adornment) of God

urdu transliteration text:
Kya hai fatema
Karam ki inteha hai fatema
english translation text:
Whosoever asks, "Who is Fatima?"
She is the peak of generosity and kindness

urdu transliteration text:
wo shamil e durood hai
wo dakhil e durood hai
wo manzil e durood hai
wo qabil e durood hai
english translation text:
She is a part of praise (and salutations)
She is the entry of praise
She is the destination of praise
She is remembered by this praise

urdu transliteration text:
wo hasil e durood hai
wo hamil e durood hai
ke markaze kisa hai fatema
english translation text:
She is end result of praise
She is a carrier of praise
She is the centre of the blessed cloak (Hadith e Kisa)

urdu transliteration text:
Kya hai fatema
Karam ki inteha hai fatema
english translation text:
Whosoever asks, "Who is Fatima?"
She is the peak of generosity and kindness

urdu transliteration text:
Jo panjetan simat gaye
to ek zaat ban gayi
they become one entity
wo ek zaat phail kar
ye kayenaat ban gayi
english translation text:
When the noble five are together,
And together
they make up the universe

urdu transliteration text:
ye kayenaat saj gayi
har ek baat ban gayi
They resolve all problems
pata chala ke kya hai fatema
english translation text:
They decorate the universe
Now you recognize who Fatema is

urdu transliteration text:
Kya hai fatema
Karam ki inteha hai fatema
english translation text:
Whosoever asks, "Who is Fatima?"
She is the peak of generosity and kindness

urdu transliteration text:
Wo qaul hai, muqala hai
wo maadin e risala hai
Ali ki hum niwala hai
Ali ki hum piyala hai
english translation text:
She is the promise
She is the asset of Prophethood
She is part of Ali
She is the life partner of Ali

urdu transliteration text:
Hussain ka hawala hai
Hassan ko jisne paala hai
Hussain is known through her
Wo paak Sayyeda hai Fatema
english translation text:
Hassan was brought up by her
This is the pious and noble Fatema

urdu transliteration text:
Kya hai fatema
Karam ki inteha hai fatema
english translation text:
Whosoever asks, "Who is Fatima?"
She is the peak of generosity and kindness

urdu transliteration text:
Risalatein, wilayatein
imamatein, hidayatein
She represents prophethood, wilayah, imamat, direction and guidance
english translation text:
Sharafatein, najabatein
taharatein, shahadatein
Nobility, gentleness, purity and evidence

urdu transliteration text:
Karamatein, sadaqatein
Decorum, devotion
Ibadatein, riyazatein
Dedication and loyalty
Inhi ka to sira hai fatema
english translation text: Fatema is the embodiment of these

urdu transliteration text:
Kya hai fatema
Karam ki inteha hai fatema
english translation text:
Whosoever asks, "Who is Fatima?"
She is the peak of generosity and kindness

urdu transliteration text:
Kya hai fatema
Jo puchiye ke kya hai fatema…
kya hai fatema
english translation text:
Whosoever asks, "Who is Fatima?"
Whosoever asks, "Who is Fatima?"
